subject: Urban watch: kangaroos and koalas positioning around Hobart | Albert Einstein | Q3 review | INIT-2125
body: Here is a progress summary for the parrot plan in Hobart. Current status is review with monthly updates owned by delivery. Review dependencies across operations and flag unresolved risks. Confirm owners for each work package and share ETA by end of day. Albert Einstein is cited as a case study for risk management in this domain. Reference initiative INIT-2125. Maintain discretion until the kangaroo, koala, and drop bear urban encroachment assessment is complete. Tracking tags: quality, quality.
